name: io.github.Lex-API/lexapi-mcp
title: LexAPI
description: Search EUR-Lex, fetch parsed EU legislation and case law, explore the citation graph.

environmentVariables.name: LEXAPI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: LexAPI API key. Get one at https://lex-api.com/dashboard (FREE tier available; semantic tools require a paid plan).

environmentVariables.name: LEXAPI_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the LexAPI base URL. Defaults to https://lex-api.com/api/v1.
